---
title: "Final Project Part"
output: html_document
date: "2026-05-04"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r}
library(ggplot2)
data <- read.csv("insurance.csv")
data
```


#Age and Charges
```{r}
data |> ggplot(aes(x=age, y=charges))+geom_point(alpha=0.5)+labs(title="Relationship between Age and Insurance Charges", x="Age", y="Insurance Charges")
```
```{r}
data |> ggplot(aes(x=age, y=charges, color=smoker))+geom_point(alpha=0.5)+labs(title="Age and Insurance Charges for Smokers v Non-Smokers", x="Age", y="Insurance Charges")
```

#Region and Charges

```{r}
data |> ggplot(aes(x=factor(region), y=charges, fill=region))+geom_boxplot()+labs(title="Relationship between Region and Insurance Charges", x="Regions", y="Insurance Charges")
```
